title: Charge case outside screen/third screen, left zoom in/out
scenario: Quick Start Guide third screen zoom toggles when clicking left circle button on charge case outside view
steps: Open the Poly Studio Mobile app.
Tap on the Quick Start Guide (QSG) option.
Swipe or navigate to the third screen showing the charge case outside view.
Tap the left circle button on the screen.
Tap the left circle button again.
expected: On first tap, the view zooms in and displays new text. On second tap, the view zooms out to the original screen showing the charge case outside view.
